# SupportHive — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A tech support business focused on providing technical assistance and solutions. The user envisions a modern, professional online presence to attract clients seeking reliable tech help.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://supporthive-7a2a07a9.zappy5.app
Experience reliable quality technology services that turn your tech frustrations into seamless solutions. From instant troubleshooting to full-scale IT support, SupportHive keeps your digital world running smoothly. Get expert help now.

### Services
https://supporthive-7a2a07a9.zappy5.app/services
Discover comprehensive information technology services tailored to your needs. Our technology consulting services cover remote fixes, system optimization, and strategic IT planning designed for performance. Explore all plans today.

### About
https://supporthive-7a2a07a9.zappy5.app/about
Learn why businesses and individuals choose SupportHive for honest, fast, and transparent tech assistance. Our mission is to deliver quality technology services with a human touch and real accountability. Read our story.

### Contact
https://supporthive-7a2a07a9.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to fix what&#39;s broken and future-proof your setup? Reach out to our friendly team for immediate assistance and personalized information technology services. Let&#39;s solve it together—contact SupportHive now.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://supporthive-7a2a07a9.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://supporthive-7a2a07a9.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About SupportHive
A tech support business focused on providing technical assistance and solutions. The user envisions a modern, professional online presence to attract clients seeking reliable tech help.

## Target Audience
- Small Business Owners
- Remote Work Teams
- Startup Tech Leaders

## Industry
Technology Services
